Officials at the land registration
office In the Hutton building are
busy this afternoon compilina fig-
ures on the complete regietrAti0n
for the Spokane In0;an reservation.


The notaries are making their

the total will be secured. The reg
istration yesterday fell consider
ably short of the preceding days.
The grand total for all reservations
will not go to 100000.


Crowds OF strangers continue to
flock to the Hutton building, indi-
eating that hte visitors are staying
until the drawing takes place.


The familiar signs. authorised
Notary have disappeared. and the
lawyers and real estate men who
have been busy since July is TAX
ing the stray quarters OF the land
seekers have again moved back to
their old quarters.


There are lot Of people making
calculations as to what they will.
do when they get their ranches III
the land drawings, but the repre-
sentatives of the land departemnt
suggest that it might be well 10
